case_title: BODINE, MONTY vs. MCGAUGHRAN, RALPH, INDIVIDUALLY et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-07-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE DIRECTED TO PLT'S ATTY. HEARING SET FOR AUG-13-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-17-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON SEP-17-1997, TO FILE POS. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY ROBERT P GARCIA. PLTF'S COUNSEL TO FILE A STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-02-1997 CONTINUED FROM SEP-17-1997 TO OCT-22-1997 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-11-1998, OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON 2-10-98 OF ONLY DEFT.

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-22-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON OCT-22-1997, SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY TO OBTAIN PROOF OF SERVICE PLTF'S ATTY TO FILE STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HRG, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-06-1997 CONTINUED FROM OCT-22-1997 TO DEC-10-1997 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

CONSTRUCTION, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BODINE, MONTY AS TO DEFENDANT MCGAUGHRAN, RALPH INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS SERVING ROOFING COMPANY AND           SERVICE CONCRETE AND ROOFING COMPANY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-07-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-05-1997 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUN-17-1997
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BODINE, MONTY
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF BODINE, MONTY

OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-10-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $500.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON DEC-10-1997, TO FILE POS OR PROOF OF PUBLICATION. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY ROBERT P GARCIA, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-25-1997 CONTINUED FROM DEC-10-1997 TO FEB-11-1998 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT MCGAUGHRAN, RALPH INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS SERVING ROOFING COMPANY AND           SERVICE CONCRETE AND ROOFING COMPANY
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.

OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-13-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE POS OR SIGNED ORDER TO SERVE BY PUBLICATION AS TO DEFT. TO AMEND COMPLAINT AND SERVE DOE DEFT. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY ROBERT P GARCIA. HEARING SET FOR SEP-17-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
